Binding (registry.js:428), deliverable counts (registry.js:1750) and micro-title counts (registry.js:1764) match the prompt/baseline distributions exactly and sum to 40 (hermes_evidence 20 / implementation 16 / test 2 / claude_review 2; M02 6 / M03 22 / M04 12); the coverage validator (validators.js:2749) checks these against the live plan, and the manifest included_units distribution reconciles to the same totals. Upstream chain CP00-845..CP00-867 is intact (validate script lines 53-121; binding upstream_pack_id CP00-866). Every descriptor row is built by createRow (registry.js:1965), which hard-codes descriptor_only:true and all runtime/install/write/leak flags false; the descriptor validator (validators.js:2785) fails closed on any runtime execution, marketplace opening, permission/audit/product-state write, or real-data/secret/token/prompt inclusion (validators.js:2814-2842), and MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:35) is spread into the descriptor. Authority boundary is correct: descriptor.authority_boundary (registry.js:3666) and the Claude packet (registry.js:2802) keep Claude read-only and non-final-approver, require human approval for runtime opening, and disclaim enterprise trust for local validation; the Hermes packet (registry.js:2525) is control-plane only (emits_runtime_receipt:false, writes_product_state:false, no_real_data:true), consistent with hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false. Tests (model.test.js:868-902) assert empty coverage/descriptor errors, runtime-closed rows (row_count 40), and a current CP00-867 contract projection; index.js wildcard re-exports all symbols the validate script imports. Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded (readiness-report.json exit 0, 1455-byte stdout, not 0-byte/malformed), invalid_review_attempts is empty, and the pending-state evidence (command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md) is mutually consistent and does not over-claim production_ready or runtime/enterprise trust. The CP00-866 P3 (changed-file-scope double-listing) is resolved here: untracked_implementation_files and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved are disjoint, and unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook, docx, ldip invalid-attempt) are correctly kept out of pack scope.
